use_cases: Displaying success, error, or warning messages to users after actions
Showing informational notifications or alerts within applications
Providing dismissible feedback banners for form submissions
Communicating system status updates or alerts
Delivering contextual messages with icons and close functionality
ai_summary: A versatile alert and notification component with multiple variants (primary, secondary, destructive, success, info, warning, mono) and appearances (solid, outline, light, stroke). Features customizable sizes, icon slots, and a dismissible close button. Built with Tailwind CSS and class variance authority for flexible theming through CSS variables, making it suitable for any web application needing user feedback components.
